nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, to all the exiles whom I have sent into exile from Jerusalem to Babylon,

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, to all the exiles whom I have sent into exile from Jerusalem to Babylon:

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神對所有被擄的，就是耶和華把他們從耶路撒冷擄到巴比倫去的人，這樣說：

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华对所有从耶路撒冷被掳到巴比伦的人说：
